Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: E8 - The Big Ones
programme.desc: Learn why bigger is definitely better for these alphas. Go ringside for a gorilla wrestling match, stay away from pushy moose antlers, steer clear of long pelican bills that snap at any enemy within range, and marvel at a megashark’s stereo sniffer.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: Pridelands: Wilderness Reborn
programme.desc: An Australian family go on an adventure to restore an old hunting ranch in South Africa. Their goal is to rebuild the overgrown habitat, create an eco-tourism ranch, and allow the natural wildlife, including predators, to move back in.

programme.title: E1 - The Invasion Begins
programme.desc: When the all-female Hollywood pride encounters the Nomads, a new pride of rival males, they may have found the answer to their mating dry spell. But they quickly realize that it will not be a happy encounter.

programme.title: E3 - Punks on the Run
programme.desc: The lions of the Nomad pride rampage deep into the heart of the MK pride’s territory, scattering its members and coming dangerously close to the five new MK cubs. Meanwhile, the Hollywoods are recovering, and Ava’s survival skills are still intact.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.title: Pridelands: Wilderness Reborn
programme.desc: An Australian family go on an adventure to restore an old hunting ranch in South Africa. Their goal is to rebuild the overgrown habitat, create an eco-tourism ranch, and allow the natural wildlife, including predators, to move back in.

programme.title: E1 - The Invasion Begins
programme.desc: When the all-female Hollywood pride encounters the Nomads, a new pride of rival males, they may have found the answer to their mating dry spell. But they quickly realize that it will not be a happy encounter.

programme.title: E3 - Punks on the Run
programme.desc: The lions of the Nomad pride rampage deep into the heart of the MK pride’s territory, scattering its members and coming dangerously close to the five new MK cubs. Meanwhile, the Hollywoods are recovering, and Ava’s survival skills are still intact.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.title: E9 - Power
programme.desc: Power-up with alphas who use might to subdue enemies. Marvel when sea lions throw their weight around to win a mate, Cape buffalo deliver knockout punches, Canada geese hit hard with their wings, and lionesses rule the savannah with an iron paw.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: E3 - Elephant Story
programme.desc: Once superabundant, African Elephant populations have declined drastically due to hunting. Get an in-depth look into the lives of the most powerful land mammals on the planet, and see what parks like Addo and Tembe are doing to preserve their future.

programme.title: E4 - Killer Packs
programme.desc: Surviving the African savanna requires guile and teamwork for species who live in packs. Follow a day in the life of African wild dogs and dwarf mongooses to see how they rely on their tight-knit families to overcome the challenging landscape.

programme.title: E5 - Living Together
programme.desc: A complex web of relationships rules all life on earth: all species are interconnected, none can survive in isolation. While some relationships are one-sided, others are mutually beneficial. From loose associations to tight-knit partnerships, everything has a place in nature’s great scheme. Complex interactions between species are not even limited to animals, and some of the best examples occur in the lush mountain forests of Africa.

programme.title: E1 - Food, Glorious Food
programme.desc: Embark on a dangerous tagging mission in South Australia that will show what sharks eat and why they gather in feeding hot spots. Then head north as a team chases tiger, bull, and hammerhead sharks and outfits one with a 360-degree dorsal camera.

programme.desc: The lions of the Nomad pride rampage deep into the heart of the MK pride’s territory, scattering its members and coming dangerously close to the five new MK cubs. Meanwhile, the Hollywoods are recovering, and Ava’s survival skills are still intact.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage

programme.title: E473
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E224
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.
NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.

programme.title: E170
programme.desc: Through the captivating stories presented in We Are One, the viewers can fully immerse themselves in the narratives and witness the genuine emotions that arise between humans and animals. These emotions are rooted in love and go beyond mere boundaries, showcasing the remarkable power of love in forging meaningful connections.

programme.title: E427
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.desc: While facing off with The Brain, Robin tries to teach the other Titans the proper definition of irony.

programme.title: Steven Universe The Movie E1 -Steven Universe - The Movie
programme.desc: After so many harrowing adventures, Steven and the Gems are ready to celebrate how far they've come with a movie musical! Little do they know they're about to face their worst enemy yet.

programme.title: E116 - Dramedy My Friend/Booboocat
programme.desc: Mo has to play a video game with Stella, but it contains his worst fear! He asks for the power to control his emotions, but with the half power alone his emotions are unpredictable.

programme.title: E218 - Brainlord/Lights Out!/Checkin' Out!/Drama Bomb/Watch it!
programme.desc: A new superhero arrives in Townsville with a dark secret.

programme.title: E3 - The Cruise/Coconut Shy
programme.desc: Mr Bean wins tickets for a Cruise but if only he could stay on it!

programme.title: E25 - The Sweet Life Of Mr.Bee/The Doctor's Haunted Mansion/Don't Move/Muscle! Muscle! Musc
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found in a bee hive. Deca attempts take the bee hive. The angry bees start chasing after Deca and Shiro.

programme.title: The Case - Limited Time Rescue
programme.desc: Police Force - Commercial Crime Bureau has been investigating Jufeng's finance for many years, but all failed due to insufficient evidence. In order to collect evidence, the Commercial Crime Bureau sent an informant to Jufeng. But when the informant successfully entered Jufeng Computer and stole the account, the immediate supervisor Sir Ren died mysteriously. Sir Chong started to take over the case...

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: Chang-soo, a guy who has never been in a romantic relationship, earns a magical power after accidentally wearing a perfume he receives from a stranger. The supernatural power he earns is what any man would dream of, an ability to attract every woman in the world! Ara, a woman Chang-soo has been in love with, begins to sense the scent of Chang-soo and falls in love with him. While they gradually grow their connection, Ara's ex-boyfriend, James, suddenly appears and reveals Chang-soo's secret! Will the two people overcome this predicament and find true love in each other?

programme.title: Overheard 3
programme.desc: Five Years ago, LAW was jailed for killing a major land owner in a car accident. At that time LAW worked as a chauffeur for the rural tycoon LUK. It was rumored that LUK was behind such land owner's death, which gave LUK a competitive edge in the native apartment development deal. Before the Hong Kong handover in 1997, every native, male resident in the New Territories was granted the right to build a house. Yet it had caused social unrest over the land right, until recently the government decided to gather all of the remaining land rights from these residents and plan to build taller apartment buildings. LUK wished to swallow the enormous project and this started the fights between LUK, the land owner and other real estate developers. When LAW gets out of prison five years later, the world has changed...

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Daniel Wu: The Last Supper
programme.desc: The early history of a nation unfolds through the actions of three heroes – Liu Bang, Xiang Yu and Han Xin – who chased their dreams of uniting a warring nation and fought through major milestones of the Chu-Han Contention years in the third century. From the Julu War to the Hongmen Banquet, the Gaixia War to the death of HanXin, the narration of Liu Bang – who would be the founding emperor of the new Han Dynasty – sets the stage for a tale of betrayal and brothers at war, where the last man standing inherits a nation.

programme.title: The Hill of Secrets
programme.desc: Sensitive 12-year-old Myung-eun (Moon Seung-a) is embarrassed of her working-class family and constantly lies to keep her true family situation a secret. When she writes, though, she is not constrained by reality. Pouring herself into essays, Myung-eun takes pride in constructing a different world of her own. However, the candid writings of a new student shake her sense of self, and prompt Myung-eun to better understand her family. Reminiscent of acclaimed coming-of-age Korean indies like The World of Us and House of Hummingbird, writer-director Lee Ji-eun's understated debut feature excels in its perceptive depiction of the emotions and experiences of a child trying to find her place in the world.

programme.title: Hit N Fun
programme.desc: “CHUNG LUI SOCIETY” is a boxing gym founded by the former legendary Muay Thai champion CHUNG Lui, who is dedicated to training professional fighters. Despite the gym's struggles, he remains committed to his lifelong philosophy of never backing down from a challenge. Businesswoman Elsa discovers that her boyfriend Daniel is cheating on her with Macau's female champion, Surewin. Driven by her competitive spirit, Elsa vows to settle their score in the ring. Upon learning that Surewin was Lui's former student, Elsa seeks him out to train her at his gym. Upon learning that Surewin was Lui's former student, Elsa seeks him out to train her at his gym. There, she encounters MOK Ka Lei, who had previously clashed with her during an advertisement shoot. After leaving the entertainment industry to support her family, Ka Lei attempts to make a comeback, with the help of her friend LAM Pik Chu. Under the rigorous training of Lui's protege, KO Chau, Elsa undergoes intense preparation. Alth

programme.title: Café Midnight: Missing Honey
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Yoon waits for her groom Tae-young on their wedding day but he doesn't show up. Out of concern and anger, she searches for him all day and in the dead of night, she arrives at a strange place called 'Cafe Midnight', which opens from midnight until the sun rises. Upon entering Yoon finally finds Tae-young, but something doesn't seem right. He looks a few years younger and he doesn't even recognize her. As past, present and future merge, will the bride find her groom?

programme.title: Lonely Eighteen
programme.desc: This is a story about how family can impact the growth of a young woman. It follows Elaine, who grew up in poverty in the 1980's, and her best friend Ying as they enter the Hong Kong entertainment industry to change their fate. In the golden era of Hong Kong cinema, Ying becomes a popular erotic star while Elaine struggles between her identity and her job as an actor. When Hong Kong cinema's glory fades a decade later, the two women end up on diverging paths due to their life choices.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E279 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Donnie Yen’s Action Series: Come Back Home
programme.desc: De and his family are on a self-driving tour heading to Northeast Changbai Mountain during a chilling winter, unfortunately the happy holiday goes tragic after De lost his 8 years old son by mistake. De and his wife seek for help from the police, and the rescue mission begins. The rescue process in the mountains and the ice lakes gets dangerous as time goes by due to the bad weather. The golden rescue time has passed after 24 hours, then the standard safe limit of rescue of 48 hours has also passed. However, the child still hasn't been found. Even with the slightest chance to save the boy, De and rescue teams from the police and the snow field refuse to give their mission up. Will they see the miracle of life eventually?

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E279 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E12 - Test Of Faith
programme.desc: Just after sunrise, investigators respond to a local hospital where an elderly woman is fighting for her life after a brutal six-hour assault. Though injured, the victim can describe the vicious assault.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Nine wandering spirits haunt a Singaporean family as they move into a new house; Karla Pambid from Philippines has a special gift - an ability to communicate with the unseen.

programme.title: E500 - Back Street
programme.desc: When a man is shot on the side of the road, clues lead Detective Jason White to an ongoing crime spree in his 100th case for Tulsa Homicide.

programme.title: E14 - The Women Salt Workers
programme.desc: In Guerande's salt marshes ''paludiere'', the feminine form of ''paludier'' or salt worker, long-referred to the salt worker's wife, with no professional status. Today 15% of ''paludieres'' run their own salt business. Dominique, Veronique and Morgane recount how their place in a still predominantly masculine profession, changed over the years.

programme.title: E19 - Cite Du Vitrail/Aude Franjou/Palomo Spain/Oodelally
programme.desc: The Cite du vitrail in Troyes traces almost ten centuries of history. In Paris, textile artist Aude Franjou's linen sculpture has taken up position inside the July Column on Place de la Bastille. In a theatrical spirit, Palomo Spain blurs genres. Meet artist and cabinetmaker Maxim, creator of the Oodelally workshop.

programme.title: E78 - Adopting The Bra Top
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E16 - Semolina Cakes
programme.desc: This week, Leila Albert welcomes Rosine Binder from Alsace who loves her region, into her kitchen. She concocts a traditional recipe that she inherited from her mother: griesknepfle, or semolina cakes, and a savoury gratin with tomato sauce.

programme.title: E6 - Curieux Begin In Tuscany
programme.desc: Stopover in Italy! From Chianti to Subbiano, from large vineyards to small farms, Christian visits Tuscany and discovers its land, artisans, and culinary treasures.

programme.title: E1 - La Traviata
programme.desc: A free woman, forbidden love, social exclusion... ''La Traviata'' by Giuseppe Verdi was created in 1853. Extracts from the opera performed in 2020 at the Bordeaux Grand Theatre, under the musical direction of Paul Daniel.

programme.desc: Francois Duruz, a former city dweller turned shepherd and watercolorist, finds in solitude, nature and light a profound balance. He has transformed his mountain refuge into an ephemeral gallery where landscapes, colors and emotions become one.

programme.title: E26 - Camera Fright
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: E36 - Manatee
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: A L'instinct
programme.desc: Teva Royer, police lieutenant in Cayenne, Guyana, heads to Nantes to lead the investigation into the suspicious death of a wealthy businessman's daughter. Once on-site, he teams up with Ana Kerjouan, captain in the regional police force. Given their diametrically opposed methods, their partnership looks set to be complicated.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E9 - The Tadpole Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E8 - African Penguins
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Cape town, off the coast of South Africa, on a global adventure to find out why African penguins are living in the city.

programme.title: E8 - African Penguins
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Cape town, off the coast of South Africa, on a global adventure to find out why African penguins are living in the city.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E34 - Go Jet Academy: Mudslide
programme.desc: It's a very rainy day at the Go Jet Academy and the Go Jetters are teaching the Cadets some crucial Go Jetter skills.

programme.title: E8 - Watch The Birdie
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: E9 - Pirate Parade
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.

programme.title: E21 - Robotato Returns
programme.desc: Evil Pea commands Carrot's new and improved Robotato to protect her. But when he malfunctions and carries her to the top of Tato Tower, it's up to the real Supertato to save her.

programme.title: E22 - Fruit And Veggie Friends Day
programme.desc: Everyone in the supermarket is enjoying Fruit and Veggie Friends Day, where they get to celebrate friendship, but Evil Pea wants to ruin it - and Supertato keeps stopping her.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Ginbayashi Yoko (Koike Eiko), a world-class chef, loses everything when her restaurant's owner vanishes with the profits. Now supporting two children, she takes a job as a prison nutritionist, where her inventive meals begin to win over inmates. But when a former inmate is arrested again, Yoko is forced to confront a difficult question: Can people truly change? A new quest begins - earning three “Musholan” stars behind bars.

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!

programme.title: E8 - Calming Colors
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.desc: Features the local agriculture industry from practical tips on animal raising and planting to stories of entrepreneurs behind the country's most profitable farms and agricultural spaces.

E8 - Anonymous
programme.desc: Royce Harmon was murdered in a scene staged to look like a suicide. Now another murder has taken place. Whoever the killer is, he has a thorough knowledge of forensics and has baffled Grissom and his team.

programme.title: E15 - Tinker, Tailor, Liar, Thief
programme.desc: While in London, Jessica becomes involved in a murder cover-up by the British Intelligence Agency when she happens upon a disappearing corpse.

programme.title: E8 - Anonymous
programme.desc: Royce Harmon was murdered in a scene staged to look like a suicide. Now another murder has taken place. Whoever the killer is, he has a thorough knowledge of forensics and has baffled Grissom and his team.

programme.title: E12 - My Mom, The Mon
programme.desc: Peggy is the hit of Mother/Daughter Career Day at Kelly's school when she instructs the girls in the art of being a housewife, including demonstrations of wallet pilfering and mastering the TV remote control.

programme.title: E13 - Can't Dance, Don't Ask Me
programme.desc: When Kelly is faced with a choice of getting kicked out of school or joining the tap dance club, she swallows her pride, buckles on her tap shoes and performs some dirty dancing that leaves the audience sweating in their seats.

programme.title: E13 - Can I Get A Witness?
programme.desc: Accused of breaking the Ochmoneks' window, ALF is put on trial by the Tanners. Certain he can defend himself and avoid the penalty of no TV privileges for a month, ALF agrees to participate in the proceeding.

programme.title: E5 - Behind The Wheel
programme.desc: David helps a taxi cab company owner fight a dope smuggling operation.

programme.title: E10 - Sex, Lies and Larvae
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some valuable art.

programme.title: E406 - Pups Save Jake's Cake / Pups Save A Wild Ride
programme.desc: Ryder and the Pups need to help get a surprise birthday ice cream cake up to Jake's cabin. // Alex and Daring Danny X are snowboarding right for Risky Ridge and need help from the PAW Patrol.

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: E109 - Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect 'Step-Mother's' day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: E111 - Cake-Tastrophe!
programme.desc: When a hungry Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck's baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away! It's up to AJ and Blaze to track down all the rampaging robots before Axle City is blanketed in baked goods.

programme.title: E304 - The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day P
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: E113 - Queen Holly / The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away, but ruling isn't as easy as it looks. // Ben and Holly discover that Nanny Plum is a tooth fairy, and head out with her, but they're shocked when they see the little girl they're visiting.

programme.title: E607 - The Construction Contest
programme.desc: To compete in the Axle City Construction Contest, Blaze and his friends turn into construction vehicles! But when Crusher sends them far away, it'll take all of their construction skills combined to make it back before time runs out.

programme.title: E113 - Queen Holly / The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away, but ruling isn't as easy as it looks. // Ben and Holly discover that Nanny Plum is a tooth fairy, and head out with her, but they're shocked when they see the little girl they're visiting.

programme.title: E526 - Madame Gazelle's Leaving Party
programme.desc: The children are sad because their favorite teacher, Madame Gazelle, is leaving daycare. But a leaving party will give her a good send-off.

programme.title: E602 - Desert Island
programme.desc: When a fishing trip goes wrong, leaving Grandpa Pig, Granddad Dog, and Grampy Rabbit stranded on a desert island, Captain Daddy Dog is the only one able to save them.

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E307 - The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sp

E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E6 - Bayou Meets Land
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: E6 - Bangladesh
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country’s rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish, cow stomach, and goat brain curry, and race some locals on their rickshaw bikes. The trip concludes with Rooftop and Catfish heading out of town by train- only running across the top. With all of Bangladesh’s physical dangers, can the BMX bikers make it out without a hospital visit?

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: Soco[Live]
programme.desc: The iconic investigative docudrama returns with gripping interviews and reenactments of real-life crimes. Veteran host Gus Abelgas is joined by ABS-CBN's top crime reporters: Zyan Ambrosio, Dennis Datu, Jeff Caparas, Lyza Aquino and Jessie Cruzat.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. The updated version continues to explore how we can positively help shape the character of our young people and, ultimately, the future of our nation. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: is the continuous story on how we can positively help shape the character of our young people, and eventually, the future of our nation. It is guiding the youth to listen to the past, discern today and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Making Electricity
programme.desc: The power goes out just as Smorph is busting his best moves, meaning it's time to find out how electricity is made and to get the party going again.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Hair Curse
programme.desc: Astoria panics because she wakes up in the library every morning. Rose and the others discover her ivy-hair is taking her there while she sleeps. They get a magical shampoo to cure it, but Astoria's hair is always one step ahead.

programme.title: West Coast - Heading For Bird Island
programme.desc: Trying to find a shortcut to Bird Island, the youngsters end up stuck in a desolate dune field. Night falls and they encounter creatures that both scare and enthral them. They find a path to the coast and must cross a mighty river with the help of local fishermen.

programme.title: The Deadly Caterpillar
programme.desc: The carnivorous caterpillar of Hawaii has evolved to eat flies. It has grabbing arms and sharp jaws. It creates a hiding place for itself on a leaf so it can't be seen.

programme.title: Mind Mess
programme.desc: Something's wrong-Motor is meowing! Carol and Robbie find he's swapped brains with a cat in a lab experiment gone right... but now he can't switch back! As they try to fix it, chaos erupts: Robbie ends up in Carol's body, Carol in Robbie's, and Motor's still a cat!

programme.title: Heart Attach
programme.desc: Kaylyn and Alicia struggle to find a new name for the company. Noodles' love detection device disrupts the group's harmony and must ultimately get destroyed.

programme.title: We Are Superheroes!
programme.desc: It's superhero time as the doctors' alter-egos go into battle to show the secret powers of your skin, which uses Vitamin D from the sun to make your bones strong! And Dr. Raph is on duty for incredible eye surgery.

programme.title: Heavy Surgery
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have got one day's experience under their belts. Today a wild boar needs the Junior Vets' help, a tiny dog goes in a massive scanner, and a snotty cow is having heavy surgery.

programme.title: Hottentots Holland Nature Reserve - On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When travelling across a mountain range, the team must cross a dangerous narrow gorge while hanging off cables between heaven and earth. When they discover the only way forward is to jump into a giant waterfall, the team has to make a tough decision.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Ghost Hunting
programme.desc: When Mundi is startled by Fico's prank, she insists she isn't afraid of ghosts. They don't even exist! Oto and Anabella definitely believe in ghosts. Mundi vows to prove they don't, with a trip to a so-called ‘ghost town' in Tombstone, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: River of Esmeralda
programme.desc: Teresa plans to call down an invasion during the finale of a popular TV telenovela, during which all of Cucurtown will be inside, watching.

programme.title: Food of the Future
programme.desc: Kids try foods of the future.

programme.title: Hottentots Holland Nature Reserve - On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When travelling across a mountain range, the team must cross a dangerous narrow gorge while hanging off cables between heaven and earth. When they discover the only way forward is to jump into a giant waterfall, the team has to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Lonesome Jim
programme.desc: The rarest tortoise in the world has been stolen and the Nektons are searching for it. But they're walking into a trap.

programme.title: Higher Power
programme.desc: The more high up in the sky we get, the stronger and less turbulent wind is. If only we could use that wind power as a source of alternative energy ... In this episode, we meet a team of scientists that successfully transmits power from up to three kilometers' altitude.

programme.desc: HBO Films’ PATERNO centres on Penn State's Joe Paterno in the aftermath of the Jerry Sandusky sexual abuse scandal.

programme.title: E3 - Valerie Faces Reality

programme.title: Idol Sa Kusina
programme.desc: An entertaining and informative cooking program that showcases scrumptious cuisines. Together with the celebrities, the show unfolds topnotch kitchen skills and culinary secrets that will make cooking dishes effortless.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Return To Paradise
programme.desc: Follows college students Red and Eden, who fall in love after being stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash, only to face challenges from their families' feud after they're rescued.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Asean·Korea Music Festival <Round In Philippines>
programme.desc: ASEAN·Korea Music Festival is a public cultural diplomacy project that aims to expand cooperation between ASEAN and Korea and foster cultural exchange among young people across Asia through popular music.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: In this first episode, Samira journeys to places rarely seen by western audiences to reveal how the Persian Empire was born, the mysterious writing of its early people and how Iran's powerful kings built a vast empire that became the envy of the ancient world.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E1 - Black Dog

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: By day Emma is a good Amish girl, but by night she sneaks out with her friend and together they lead a double life. When she witnesses a murder while out, her life and community are thrown into peril.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E12 - Collard Green Dumplings & Apple Pie Potstickers
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: After over a year of hard work, the time has come to wrap up the epic project. The four directors and the master eagerly rush to see the completed stores as the dramatic grand reveal begins.

programme.title: E12 - Collard Green Dumplings & Apple Pie Potstickers
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: E6 - A Diff-Occult Deal
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: E21 - Beyond The Readings: Feeding The Soul
programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.title: E21 - Beyond The Readings: Feeding The Soul
programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: E13 - Jamaican Beef Pot Pie
programme.desc: Chef Deborah elevates the classic Jamaican beef patty by giving it a Southern twist and turning it into a delicious pot pie. This hearty and flavourful dish offers a vibrant journey to the Caribbean.

programme.title: E9 - Red Wine Beef Stew Over Polenta
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a popular Tuscan dish of red wine-infused beef stew served with creamy polenta.

programme.title: E13 - Jamaican Beef Pot Pie
programme.desc: Chef Deborah elevates the classic Jamaican beef patty by giving it a Southern twist and turning it into a delicious pot pie. This hearty and flavourful dish offers a vibrant journey to the Caribbean.

programme.title: E8 - Hippie Haven
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy get a hot tip about a former rental property on the outskirts of Austin. Within city limits and close to the airport, the ranch-style home definitely has a country feel.

programme.title: E9 - Pigpen Profit
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy get a lead on a house in the Oak Hill neighbourhood of Austin. The kitchen and main bath are a hodgepodge of basic builder-grade finishes and the layout of the house is confusing.

programme.title: A Kidnapping In Amish Country
programme.desc: When Amish woman Lena realises her daughter has been abducted, she is forced to turn to the only person who can help: her estranged best friend Skye, who has renounced the Amish way of life.

Superstars Comedy: When East Goes West
programme.desc: Fei is the master cook in Hong Kong, while his son Suckling has established himself as a real estate salesman in Canada. Suckling sends for his father to join him in this new chapter of their lives. Happily, Fei hops on a plane to Canada. During the flight, he has the good fortune of meeting Yim Chau, a young woman traveling to join her aunt in Canada. Subsequently, Fei meets Yim Chau's aunt and Suckling meets Yim Chau. Suckling loves Yim Chau but is too shy to express his feelings. When Yim Chau announces she falls in love with Richard, Suckling feels heartbroken but still helps her with dating preparations. However, when he discovers Richard cheating her, Suckling fights him. At the same time, he is being chased by the bank for debts...

programme.title: Ghost Office
programme.desc: 'Ghost Invasion'- Tung, who has a simple and pure mind and just started his new job, is quickly attracted by his cool but sexy boss – Sam. At the same time, he meets with his secondary schoolmate in the company – Mick. Mick always talks about women with Tung, he even sets a goal of ‘counting on Sam'. Later, Tung always meets Sam because of overtime work. Sam always changes the style and image when she comes out from washroom at night, which she turns to be seducing, charming and totally different from the one at daytime...'A Horny Ghost'- The boss of a pornographic films dubbing company is a horny man, he is accidentally killed because of a sexual harassment. However, his colleagues are still being sexually harassed by him even he is a ghost now...'The Queen of Gossip'- Amanda, who is the queen of gossip, is noisy and like to exaggerate everything. Even her friends can never escape from her, any good news of her friends will be violated and changed to a bad news. The stranges

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: Naughty Boys
programme.desc: Four sworn brothers failed heist and get into jail for years. Sheng is set free. The three ask Sheng to get the hidden loot and wait for their eventual reunion. Sheng discovers the loot has disappeared but the other three are convinced Sheng has stolen it. Sheng has to escape. His childhood lover Chuan tries to help him to go overseas but is hurt when Sheng falls for insurance detective Bonnie. Sheng and Bonnie buy tickets from Liang who is left holding the bag when his boss absconds with the money...

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E7 - 詩禮傳家
programme.desc: 運用了經常出現在電影中的特效技術來拍攝，讓觀眾從不同的角度觀看，像置身於拍攝現場一樣；除了有課本上的詩詞內容外，還融入國風體育運動、美術繪畫、音樂表演等內容，利用豐富有趣的環節形式激發青少年學習傳統文化的熱情。
